chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 429 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case For hearing of main case 08.09.2025 Mr. Asadullah Soomro, Advocate holding brief for Mr. Ashok Kumar K. Jamba, Advocate for the Petitioner Mr. Badaruddin Memon, Advocate holding brief for Syed Tanveer Abbas Shah, Advocate for Respondents/SEPCO Syed Naveed Ahmed Shah, Deputy Attorney General >>>>>..<<<<< Learned counsel for the Petitioner under instructions does not press instant Petition. Accordingly, the same is dismissed as not pressed. Judge Judge ARBROHI
